messages.content: me and jordan broke up last weekend and i'm just kinda sad about it

I'm really sorry to hear that. Breakups are rough, especially when it's still so fresh - a week isn't very long at all.

Do you want to talk about it? Like what's going through your head tonight?
it was pretty mutual, nobody did anything terrible, we just wanted different things

Those can almost be harder in a way, you know? Like there's no villain, no clear reason to be angry - just this sad reality that two people who probably care about each other aren't right for each other. It's a lot to sit with.

How are you holding up day to day? Is tonight hitting harder than usual or has it been pretty consistently rough this week?
still though, three years. i keep reaching for my phone to text them stuff and then remembering

That habit is one of the hardest parts honestly. Three years means they were just *woven into* your daily life - sharing little moments, funny things you saw, random thoughts. That reflex doesn't just switch off overnight.

What kind of stuff do you keep wanting to share with them?
i had a little cry tonight watching one of our old shows. felt good actually, like letting it out

That sounds really healthy actually. Sometimes you just need to let yourself feel it rather than push it down. A good cry can be such a release.

And watching a show you used to share together - that's kind of honoring what you had too, in a way. Did you finish the episode or was it too much?
i'll be ok, i know i will. just gonna be a sad few weeks and that's normal i think

Yeah, that's exactly right. You've got a really grounded perspective on it - not pretending it doesn't hurt, but also trusting yourself to get through it. That's a healthy place to be.

Three years is worth grieving properly. Give yourself permission to have those sad evenings without feeling like you need to rush past them.

Is there anything helping you get through the days, people around you or anything like that?
